name: Quality Platform (uv)
updateContentCommand: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && $HOME/.local/bin/uv sync && echo '✅ uv workspace synced — run the gate with: uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy && uv run pytest --cov'

postAttachCommand.server: uv run streamlit run app.py --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
